class.name: StatsCalculator
class.brief_description: A custom RPG-style experience and level progression calculator.
class.description: This class handles character level-up mechanics using an exponential progression formula. It operates as a [RefCounted] object, meaning its memory is managed automatically by Godot's reference counting system. When experience points exceed the current level threshold, it automatically recalculates the level, consumes the required XP, and emits the [signal level_up] signal.

method.name: add_level
method.description: Instantly increases the current level by the specified [param p_level] amount. This method resets the remaining [code]total_xp[/code] to [code]0[/code] and immediately emits the [signal level_up] signal.

method.name: add_xp
method.description: Adds the specified [param p_value] amount of experience points to the pool. If the new total XP meets or exceeds the required threshold for the next level, it runs a loop to increase the level, deducts the consumed XP, and emits the [signal level_up] signal. [b]Note:[/b] The threshold is calculated dynamically using the base value of [code]100[/code] multiplied by [code]level_progression[/code] to the power of current level minus one.

method.name: get_level
method.description: Returns the character's current level. The default starting level is [code]1[/code].

method.name: get_xp
method.description: Returns the current amount of experience points remaining in the pool for the current level.

method.name: init
method.description: Initializes the multiplier for the exponential level progression formula. [b]Warning:[/b] It is recommended to call this method immediately after instantiating the object (e.g., via [code]StatsCalculator.new()[/code]) to override the default multiplier value of [code]1.1[/code].

signal.name: level_up
signal.description: Emitted when the character levels up via [method add_xp] or [method add_level]. Provides [param new_level] as the resulting level and [param levels_added] as the total number of levels gained in this specific event.
